## LibraryRuntime.IIngredient.isChocolate() method

Returns true if this is a chocolate ingredient. When true, chocolate-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isChocolate(): this is IChocolateIngredient;
```
**Returns:**

this is [IChocolateIngredient](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.ichocolateingredient.md)
